mandatory_clauses.description: Names and addresses of the temp agency (uitzendbureau) and the worker
Reference to applicable CAO (ABU or NBBU collective agreement)
Phase/scale classification under the ABU/NBBU CAO and resulting hourly rate
Name and address of the client company (inlener) where work is performed
Type of work and expected duration of the assignment
Uitzendbeding clause (if applicable): clearly stated that the contract ends when the assignment ends (Phase A only)
